DEMURRER
Off Calendar Dec-11-2001 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Robert DeVries, Esq. for x-defts & moving parties Miguel Wooding & John Roedel; Michelle Midori Yoshida, Esq. 981-5411 for x-complainants & opposing parties.
RULING: The Court announced its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer overruled, cross-complaint adequately sets forth causes of action.
Argued and the Court sustains the demurrer with leave to amend as to Roedel and overrules as to Wooding as to all causes of action except that the 2nd cause of action is sustained with leave to amend. Mr. DeVries to prepare order.

Dem X-Compl

MINI MINUTES: RULING: The Court takes the matter off calendar, amended cross-complaint filed. No appearance on this matter.
